User.title: User
User.description: Represents an individual user of the ERP system, typically an employee or operator. Assumes an external authentication system handles password and sensitive credential management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

username.description: A unique identifier or login name for the user within the system, often used for referencing from an external authentication system.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

role.description: The role or designation of the user (e.g., 'Admin', 'Sales', 'Operator', 'QC Inspector').

status.description: The current employment status of the user (e.g., 'Active', 'Inactive').

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a client or company that places orders for labels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

name.description: The legal name of the customer company.

contactPerson.description: The primary contact person's name at the customer company.

email.description: The primary email address for the customer.

phone.description: The primary phone number for the customer.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the customer's billing or main address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the customer's billing or main address (optional).

city.description: The city of the customer's address.

state.description: The state or province of the customer's address.

zipCode.description: The postal or zip code of the customer's address.

country.description: The country of the customer's address.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Represents a vendor or company that supplies raw materials, components, or services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.

name.description: The legal name of the supplier company.

contactPerson.description: The primary contact person's name at the supplier company.

email.description: The primary email address for the supplier.

phone.description: The primary phone number for the supplier.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the supplier's main address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the supplier's main address (optional).

city.description: The city of the supplier's address.

state.description: The state or province of the supplier's address.

zipCode.description: The postal or zip code of the supplier's address.

country.description: The country of the supplier's address.

suppliedMaterialTypes.description: A list of types of materials or services this supplier provides (e.g., 'Jumbo Roll Stock', 'Inks', 'Plates').

UnitOfMeasure.title: UnitOfMeasure
UnitOfMeasure.description: Defines various units of measurement used throughout the ERP system (e.g., millimeters, square meters, kilograms).

id.description: Unique identifier for the UnitOfMeasure entity (e.g., 'MM', 'SQM', 'KG', 'LBLS').

name.description: The full name of the unit of measure (e.g., 'Millimeter', 'Square Meter', 'Kilogram', 'Labels').

category.description: The category of the unit of measure (e.g., 'Length', 'Area', 'Weight', 'Count', 'Time').

Machine.title: Machine
Machine.description: Details about a specific machine used in the production process (e.g., printing press, slitting machine).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Machine entity.

name.description: A recognizable name for the machine (e.g., 'Flexo Printer 1', 'Slitter 3').

type.description: The type of machine, indicating its primary function (e.g., 'Printing Machine', 'Slitting Machine', 'Rewinding Machine', 'Finishing Machine').

model.description: The model number of the machine.

serialNumber.description: The unique serial number of the machine.

maxPrintWidthMM.description: Maximum printing width in millimeters (applicable for printing machines).

maxRepeatLengthMM.description: Maximum repeat length in millimeters (applicable for printing machines).

maxSpeedMPM.description: Maximum operational speed in meters per minute.

hourlyCost.description: The estimated operational cost per hour for this machine.

Die.title: Die
Die.description: Represents a cutting die used in the label finishing process.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Die entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the die (e.g., 'Round Die 50mm', 'Custom Shape X').

shapeType.description: The general shape category of the die (e.g., 'Circle', 'Rectangle', 'Custom', 'Oval').

dimensionsMM.description: The key dimensions of the die in millimeters (e.g., '50x50', '100x200').

status.description: The current status of the die (e.g., 'Available', 'In Use', 'Maintenance', 'Retired').

storageLocation.description: The physical location where the die is stored.

cost.description: The purchase or manufacturing cost of the die.

Plate.title: Plate
Plate.description: Represents a printing plate used in the flexographic printing process.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Plate entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the plate (e.g., 'CMYK Cyan Plate for Product XYZ').

materialType.description: The type of material the plate is made from (e.g., 'Photopolymer').

dimensionsMM.description: The dimensions of the plate in millimeters (e.g., '250x508').

color.description: The color or ink channel this plate is for (e.g., 'Cyan', 'Magenta', 'Yellow', 'Black', 'Spot Color 1').

status.description: The current status of the plate (e.g., 'New', 'Mounted', 'Used', 'Retired', 'Damaged').

storageLocation.description: The physical location where the plate is stored.

cost.description: The cost associated with manufacturing or purchasing the plate.

RawMaterial.title: RawMaterial
RawMaterial.description: Defines a type of raw material in the inventory catalog (e.g., 'Jumbo Roll - Glossy White PP', 'UV Ink - Process Cyan'). This is a definition, not a physical stock item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RawMaterial entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the raw material type.

description.description: Detailed description of the raw material.

materialType.description: The category of the material (e.g., 'Jumbo Roll Stock', 'Ink', 'Adhesive', 'Laminate Film', 'Plate Material').

baseUnitOfMeasureId.description: Reference to UnitOfMeasure for the primary unit used to track this material type (Relationship: UnitOfMeasure 1:N RawMaterial).

ratePerUnit.description: The current standard rate or cost per base unit of this raw material.

InventoryLot.title: InventoryLot
InventoryLot.description: Represents a specific physical lot or batch of raw material in stock, including Jumbo Rolls and Slitted Rolls. Each instance is a tangible item with a specific quantity, dimensions, and origin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InventoryLot entity. This can follow a hierarchical naming convention (e.g., 'TLC-1001' for jumbo, 'TLC-1001-A' for slitted).

rawMaterialId.description: Reference to the RawMaterial definition this lot belongs to (Relationship: RawMaterial 1:N InventoryLot).

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier from whom this lot was purchased (Relationship: Supplier 1:N InventoryLot).

purchaseOrderId.description: Reference to the PurchaseOrder under which this lot was received (Relationship: PurchaseOrder 1:N InventoryLot).

receiptDate.description: The date when this lot of material was received into inventory.

initialQuantity.description: The quantity of material in this lot when initially received, in the RawMaterial's base unit of measure.

currentQuantity.description: The current remaining quantity of material in this lot, in the RawMaterial's base unit of measure.

location.description: The physical storage location of this lot in the warehouse.

batchNumber.description: The batch or manufacturer's lot number for traceability.

status.description: The current status of the inventory lot (e.g., 'Available', 'Reserved', 'Consumed', 'Quarantined').

parentInventoryLotId.description: Reference to the parent InventoryLot from which this lot was derived (e.g., a Slitted Roll's parent Jumbo Roll) (Relationship: InventoryLot 1:N InventoryLot itself for hierarchy).

initialWidthMM.description: The initial width of the roll in millimeters (applicable for roll stock).

currentWidthMM.description: The current width of the roll in millimeters, which may change after slitting (applicable for roll stock).

initialLengthM.description: The initial length of the roll in meters (applicable for roll stock).

currentLengthM.description: The current length of the roll in meters, which decreases with consumption (applicable for roll stock).

barcode.description: The barcode for this specific physical inventory lot, for tracking.

FinishedGoodDefinition.title: FinishedGoodDefinition
FinishedGoodDefinition.description: Defines a type of finished product in the catalog (e.g., 'Product Label for XYZ Company'). This is a definition, not a physical stock item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FinishedGoodDefinition entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the finished product type.

description.description: Detailed description of the finished product.

artworkId.description: Reference to the primary Artwork associated with this finished product (Relationship: Artwork 1:N FinishedGoodDefinition).

baseUnitOfMeasureId.description: Reference to UnitOfMeasure for the primary unit used to track this finished product (e.g., 'LBLS' for labels) (Relationship: UnitOfMeasure 1:N FinishedGoodDefinition).

sellingPricePerUnit.description: The standard selling price per unit of this finished product.

FinishedGoodInventory.title: FinishedGoodInventory
FinishedGoodInventory.description: Represents a physical batch or lot of finished goods ready for dispatch or in storage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FinishedGoodInventory entity (e.g., 'FG-BATCH-20231026-001').

finishedGoodDefinitionId.description: Reference to the FinishedGoodDefinition this inventory lot belongs to (Relationship: FinishedGoodDefinition 1:N FinishedGoodInventory).

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard that produced this batch of finished goods (Relationship: JobCard 1:N FinishedGoodInventory).

quantity.description: The quantity of finished units in this lot.

location.description: The physical storage location of this finished good lot.

batchNumber.description: The production batch number for this lot of finished goods.

manufactureDate.description: The date when this batch of finished goods was produced.

status.description: The current status of the finished goods lot (e.g., 'Available', 'Reserved', 'Dispatched', 'On Hold').

barcode.description: The barcode for this specific physical finished goods lot, for tracking.

Artwork.title: Artwork
Artwork.description: Manages design files and associated metadata for product labels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Artwork entity.

name.description: The title or name of the artwork.

version.description: The version identifier of the artwork (e.g., '1.0', 'Rev A').

description.description: A detailed description of the artwork.

fileUrl.description: The URL or file path where the actual artwork file is stored.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL or file path to a thumbnail image of the artwork.

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the artwork was uploaded.

uploadedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who uploaded this artwork (Relationship: User 1:N Artwork).

status.description: The current approval status of the artwork (e.g., 'Draft', 'Approved', 'Rejected', 'Archived').

Estimate.title: Estimate
Estimate.description: Represents a cost estimate for a label printing job, including all calculation inputs and outputs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Estimate entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer for whom this estimate is created (Relationship: Customer 1:N Estimate).

estimateDate.description: The date when the estimate was created.

validUntilDate.description: The date until which this estimate is valid.

status.description: The current status of the estimate (e.g., 'Draft', 'Submitted', 'Approved', 'Rejected', 'ConvertedToSO').

labelLengthMM.description: The length of the individual label in millimeters.

labelWidthMM.description: The width of the individual label in millimeters.

gapMM.description: The gap between labels in millimeters (both horizontally and vertically).

sideMarginMM.description: The margin at the sides of the printing width in millimeters.

cylinderRepeatLengthMM.description: The fixed repeat length of the flexo cylinder in millimeters (e.g., 508 mm).

printingWidthLimitMM.description: The maximum effective printing width available on the machine in millimeters (e.g., 250 mm).

jumboWidthMM.description: The standard width of the jumbo rolls purchased in millimeters (e.g., 1020 mm).

numUVColors.description: The number of UV ink colors to be used in printing.

numWaterBasedColors.description: The number of water-based ink colors to be used in printing.

machineSpeedMPM.description: The estimated machine speed in meters per minute for this job.

orderQuantity.description: The total number of labels ordered by the customer.

materialRatePerSqM.description: The cost rate of the raw material per square meter.

printingRatePerM.description: The cost rate for printing per running meter.

uvRatePerM.description: The additional cost rate for UV printing per running meter.

dieCost.description: The one-time cost for the die required for this job.

plateCost.description: The one-time cost for the printing plates required for this job.

cylinderCost.description: The one-time cost for the printing cylinders required for this job.

laborCostPerHour.description: The estimated labor cost per hour for the production process.

machineCostPerHour.description: The estimated machine operational cost per hour for the production process.

wastagePercentage.description: The estimated percentage of material wastage for the job.

calculatedSlittingSizeMM.description: Automatically calculated optimal slitting width from jumbo roll in millimeters.

calculatedNumRollsFromJumbo.description: Automatically calculated number of slit rolls obtained from one jumbo roll.

calculatedLabelAcross.description: Automatically calculated number of labels printed across the web width.

calculatedLabelAround.description: Automatically calculated number of labels printed around one cylinder repeat.

calculatedTotalLabelsPerRepeat.description: Automatically calculated total labels produced per printing repeat (Labels Across * Labels Around).

calculatedTotalRepeatsRequired.description: Automatically calculated total number of printing repeats required for the order quantity.

calculatedTotalRunningMeterRequired.description: Automatically calculated total running meters of material required for the job.

calculatedMaterialConsumptionSqM.description: Automatically calculated net material consumption in square meters.

calculatedWastageMaterialSqM.description: Automatically calculated material wastage in square meters based on wastage percentage.

calculatedTotalMaterialRequiredSqM.description: Automatically calculated total material required (consumption + wastage) in square meters.

calculatedMaterialCost.description: Automatically calculated total material cost for the job.

calculatedPrintingCost.description: Automatically calculated total printing cost for the job.

calculatedUVCost.description: Automatically calculated total UV printing cost for the job.

calculatedMachineCost.description: Automatically calculated total machine cost for the job.

calculatedLaborCost.description: Automatically calculated total labor cost for the job.

calculatedTotalCost.description: Automatically calculated total production cost for the job.

calculatedCostPerLabel.description: Automatically calculated cost per single label produced.

calculatedSellingPrice.description: Automatically calculated suggested selling price for the order.

calculatedProfit.description: Automatically calculated estimated profit for the order.

calculatedProfitPercentage.description: Automatically calculated estimated profit percentage for the order.

notes.description: Any additional notes or remarks for the estimate.

BillOfMaterial.title: BillOfMaterial
BillOfMaterial.description: Defines the complete list of raw materials, machines, dies, and plates required to produce a specific finished good. Can be created from an estimate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BillOfMaterial entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for this Bill of Material (e.g., 'BOM for Product Label XYZ v1.0').

finishedGoodDefinitionId.description: Reference to the FinishedGoodDefinition that this BOM is for (Relationship: FinishedGoodDefinition 1:N BillOfMaterial).

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate from which this BOM was potentially derived (optional) (Relationship: Estimate 1:1 BillOfMaterial).

version.description: The version identifier for this BOM.

status.description: The current status of the BOM (e.g., 'Draft', 'Approved', 'Archived').

creationDate.description: The date when the BOM was created.

approvedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who approved this BOM (optional) (Relationship: User 1:N BillOfMaterial).

sampleImageUrl.description: URL to an image illustrating the final product or sample.

BomRawMaterial.title: BomRawMaterial
BomRawMaterial.description: Details a specific raw material and its quantity required within a BillOfMaterial.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BomRawMaterial entity.

billOfMaterialId.description: Reference to the parent BillOfMaterial (Relationship: BillOfMaterial 1:N BomRawMaterial).

rawMaterialId.description: Reference to the RawMaterial definition required (Relationship: RawMaterial 1:N BomRawMaterial).

quantity.description: The quantity of the raw material needed for the BOM.

unitOfMeasureId.description: Reference to UnitOfMeasure for the quantity specified (Relationship: UnitOfMeasure 1:N BomRawMaterial).

BomMachine.title: BomMachine
BomMachine.description: Specifies a machine and its estimated usage hours required for a BillOfMaterial.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BomMachine entity.

billOfMaterialId.description: Reference to the parent BillOfMaterial (Relationship: BillOfMaterial 1:N BomMachine).

machineId.description: Reference to the Machine required (Relationship: Machine 1:N BomMachine).

usageHours.description: Estimated usage time in hours for this machine in the production process described by the BOM.

BomDie.title: BomDie
BomDie.description: Specifies a die required for a BillOfMaterial.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BomDie entity.

billOfMaterialId.description: Reference to the parent BillOfMaterial (Relationship: BillOfMaterial 1:N BomDie).

dieId.description: Reference to the Die required (Relationship: Die 1:N BomDie).

BomPlate.title: BomPlate
BomPlate.description: Specifies a printing plate required for a BillOfMaterial.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BomPlate entity.

billOfMaterialId.description: Reference to the parent BillOfMaterial (Relationship: BillOfMaterial 1:N BomPlate).

plateId.description: Reference to the Plate required (Relationship: Plate 1:N BomPlate).

SalesOrder.title: SalesOrder
SalesOrder.description: Represents a confirmed order from a customer, often converted from an approved estimate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SalesOrder entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who placed the order (Relationship: Customer 1:N SalesOrder).

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate from which this SalesOrder was converted (optional) (Relationship: Estimate 1:1 SalesOrder).

orderDate.description: The date when the sales order was placed.

deliveryDate.description: The requested or promised delivery date for the order.

totalAmount.description: The sub-total amount of the sales order before taxes.

taxAmount.description: The total tax amount applied to the sales order.

grandTotal.description: The grand total amount of the sales order, including taxes.

status.description: The current status of the sales order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Confirmed', 'In Production', 'Ready for Dispatch', 'Completed', 'Cancelled').

notes.description: Any additional notes or remarks for the sales order.

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the User who created this sales order (Relationship: User 1:N SalesOrder).

SalesOrderItem.title: SalesOrderItem
SalesOrderItem.description: Details a specific finished good and its quantity within a SalesOrder.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SalesOrderItem entity.

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the parent SalesOrder (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N SalesOrderItem).

finishedGoodDefinitionId.description: Reference to the FinishedGoodDefinition ordered (Relationship: FinishedGoodDefinition 1:N SalesOrderItem).

orderedQuantity.description: The quantity of the finished good ordered.

unitPrice.description: The agreed unit price for this item.

lineTotal.description: The total price for this line item (quantity * unit price).

JobCard.title: JobCard
JobCard.description: Represents a detailed instruction card for a specific production job, detailing materials, machines, and operators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobCard entity.

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the SalesOrder this job card is for (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N JobCard).

finishedGoodDefinitionId.description: Reference to the FinishedGoodDefinition being produced (Relationship: FinishedGoodDefinition 1:N JobCard).

jobCardNumber.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for the job card.

plannedQuantity.description: The planned quantity of finished goods to be produced for this job.

actualQuantity.description: The actual quantity of finished goods produced (updated during or after production).

startDate.description: The planned start date for the job.

dueDate.description: The planned due date for the job completion.

status.description: The current status of the job card (e.g., 'Planned', 'InProgress', 'OnHold', 'Completed', 'Cancelled').

assignedOperatorId.description: Reference to the User assigned as the primary operator for this job (Relationship: User 1:N JobCard).

notes.description: Any additional notes or instructions for the job.

billOfMaterialId.description: Reference to the BillOfMaterial used for this job (Relationship: BillOfMaterial 1:N JobCard).

ProductionLog.title: ProductionLog
ProductionLog.description: Records details of specific production activities or stages for a given job card.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductionLog entity.

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard this production activity belongs to (Relationship: JobCard 1:N ProductionLog).

machineId.description: Reference to the Machine used for this production activity (Relationship: Machine 1:N ProductionLog).

operatorId.description: Reference to the User who performed this production activity (Relationship: User 1:N ProductionLog).

activityType.description: The type of production activity recorded (e.g., 'Slitting', 'Printing', 'Rewinding', 'Finishing').

startTime.description: The start date and time of the activity.

endTime.description: The end date and time of the activity.

durationMinutes.description: The calculated duration of the activity in minutes.

meterRun.description: The total length of material run through the machine in meters for this activity (e.g., for printing or slitting).

quantityProduced.description: The quantity of good items produced during this activity.

wasteQuantity.description: The quantity of material wasted during this activity.

finishedGoodProducedInventoryLotIds.description: References to FinishedGoodInventory lots created as a result of this production activity (Relationship: FinishedGoodInventory N:N ProductionLog).

notes.description: Any additional notes about the production activity.

ProductionRawMaterialConsumption.title: ProductionRawMaterialConsumption
ProductionRawMaterialConsumption.description: Records the consumption of specific raw material lots during a production activity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductionRawMaterialConsumption entity.

productionLogId.description: Reference to the ProductionLog during which this material was consumed (Relationship: ProductionLog 1:N ProductionRawMaterialConsumption).

inventoryLotId.description: Reference to the specific InventoryLot (physical stock) that was consumed (Relationship: InventoryLot 1:N ProductionRawMaterialConsumption).

quantityConsumed.description: The quantity of material consumed from the lot.

unitOfMeasureId.description: Reference to UnitOfMeasure for the quantity specified (Relationship: UnitOfMeasure 1:N ProductionRawMaterialConsumption).

QualityCheck.title: QualityCheck
QualityCheck.description: Records quality control inspections and their outcomes for a production job.

id.description: Unique identifier for the QualityCheck entity.

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard that was inspected (Relationship: JobCard 1:N QualityCheck).

inspectionDate.description: The date and time when the quality inspection was performed.

inspectorId.description: Reference to the User who performed the inspection (Relationship: User 1:N QualityCheck).

quantityInspected.description: The total quantity of items inspected.

defectiveQuantity.description: The quantity of items found to be defective.

reworkQuantity.description: The quantity of items requiring rework.

status.description: The overall status of the quality check (e.g., 'Approved', 'Rejected', 'Rework Required').

notes.description: Any additional notes or observations from the inspection.

defectIds.description: References to specific Defect types identified during the inspection (Relationship: Defect N:N QualityCheck).

Defect.title: Defect
Defect.description: Defines types of defects that can occur during production.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Defect entity.

name.description: A short, descriptive name for the defect (e.g., 'Misprint', 'Color Shift', 'Adhesive Bleed').

description.description: A detailed description of the defect.

severity.description: The severity level of the defect (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High').

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a bill issued to a customer for goods or services provided.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the SalesOrder this invoice is for (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N Invoice).

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer being billed (Relationship: Customer 1:N Invoice).

invoiceDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued.

dueDate.description: The date by which the invoice payment is due.

subTotal.description: The sub-total amount of the invoice before taxes.

taxAmount.description: The total tax amount applied to the invoice (e.g., GST).

grandTotal.description: The grand total amount of the invoice, including taxes.

status.description: The current payment status of the invoice (e.g., 'Draft', 'Issued', 'Paid', 'Partially Paid', 'Overdue', 'Cancelled').

paymentTerms.description: The agreed payment terms (e.g., 'Net 30', 'Due on receipt').

tallyExportStatus.description: Status indicating if the invoice has been exported to Tally ERP (e.g., 'Pending', 'Exported', 'Error').

generatedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who generated this invoice (Relationship: User 1:N Invoice).

Dispatch.title: Dispatch
Dispatch.description: Records the outbound shipment of finished goods to a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Dispatch entity.

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the SalesOrder being dispatched (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N Dispatch).

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer receiving the dispatch (Relationship: Customer 1:N Dispatch).

dispatchDate.description: The date when the goods were dispatched.

shippingAddressLine1.description: The first line of the shipping address.

shippingAddressLine2.description: The second line of the shipping address (optional).

shippingCity.description: The city of the shipping address.

shippingState.description: The state or province of the shipping address.

shippingZipCode.description: The postal or zip code of the shipping address.

shippingCountry.description: The country of the shipping address.

carrierName.description: The name of the shipping carrier.

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number provided by the shipping carrier.

status.description: The current status of the dispatch (e.g., 'Pending', 'Packed', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Returned').

notes.description: Any additional notes for the dispatch.

generatedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who generated this dispatch record (Relationship: User 1:N Dispatch).

PackingList.title: PackingList
PackingList.description: Represents a packing list generated for a specific dispatch, detailing the contents of the shipment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PackingList entity.

dispatchId.description: Reference to the Dispatch this packing list is associated with (Relationship: Dispatch 1:1 PackingList).

packingListNumber.description: A unique, sequential number for the packing list.

packingDate.description: The date when the goods were packed.

packedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who prepared the packing list and packed the goods (Relationship: User 1:N PackingList).

notes.description: Any additional notes for the packing list.

PackingListItem.title: PackingListItem
PackingListItem.description: Details a specific finished good lot and its quantity included in a PackingList.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PackingListItem entity.

packingListId.description: Reference to the parent PackingList (Relationship: PackingList 1:N PackingListItem).

finishedGoodInventoryId.description: Reference to the specific FinishedGoodInventory lot being dispatched (Relationship: FinishedGoodInventory 1:N PackingListItem).

quantity.description: The quantity of items from this finished good lot included in the packing list.

itemBarcode.description: The barcode of the individual item/package if applicable, for granular tracking during dispatch.

PurchaseOrder.title: PurchaseOrder
PurchaseOrder.description: Represents an order placed with a supplier for raw materials or other goods.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PurchaseOrder entity.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier from whom the goods are ordered (Relationship: Supplier 1:N PurchaseOrder).

orderDate.description: The date when the purchase order was placed.

expectedDeliveryDate.description: The expected date of delivery for the ordered goods.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the purchase order.

status.description: The current status of the purchase order (e.g., 'Draft', 'Sent', 'Confirmed', 'Received Partial', 'Received Complete', 'Cancelled').

notes.description: Any additional notes or remarks for the purchase order.

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the User who created this purchase order (Relationship: User 1:N PurchaseOrder).

PurchaseOrderItem.title: PurchaseOrderItem
PurchaseOrderItem.description: Details a specific raw material and its quantity within a PurchaseOrder.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PurchaseOrderItem entity.

purchaseOrderId.description: Reference to the parent PurchaseOrder (Relationship: PurchaseOrder 1:N PurchaseOrderItem).

rawMaterialId.description: Reference to the RawMaterial definition being ordered (Relationship: RawMaterial 1:N PurchaseOrderItem).

orderedQuantity.description: The quantity of the raw material ordered.

unitOfMeasureId.description: Reference to UnitOfMeasure for the quantity specified (Relationship: UnitOfMeasure 1:N PurchaseOrderItem).

unitPrice.description: The agreed unit price for this item from the supplier.

lineTotal.description: The total price for this line item (quantity * unit price).

receivedQuantity.description: The quantity of the item that has been received so far.

status.description: The status of this line item (e.g., 'Ordered', 'Received Partial', 'Received Complete').

definition.description: System-level administrative roles. A document's existence in this collection grants administrative privileges to the associated userId. Used solely for security rules ('Existence over Content' principle).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (from request.auth.uid) who possesses the admin role.

definition.description: Profiles for all system users, containing operational roles and personal details. Access for reading is typically self (request.auth.uid) or system administrators. Write access is restricted to self or system administrators.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, typically matching request.auth.uid.

definition.description: Master data for customer entities. Read access for sales/admin roles, write for admin/master data managers. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' if customer records are assigned to specific sales users.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier for a customer.

definition.description: Master data for supplier entities. Read access for purchasing/admin roles, write for admin/master data managers.

params.name: supplierId
params.description: The unique identifier for a supplier.

definition.description: Static reference data for units of measure. Read access for all authenticated users, write for admin/master data managers.

params.name: unitOfMeasureId
params.description: The unique identifier for a unit of measure (e.g., 'MM', 'SQM').

definition.description: Master data for production machines. Read access for all authenticated users, write for admin/master data managers.

params.name: machineId
params.description: The unique identifier for a machine.

definition.description: Master data for cutting dies. Read access for all authenticated users, write for admin/master data managers.

params.name: dieId
params.description: The unique identifier for a die.

definition.description: Master data for printing plates. Read access for all authenticated users, write for admin/master data managers.

params.name: plateId
params.description: The unique identifier for a plate.

definition.description: Master data for raw material definitions (e.g., specific types of jumbo rolls, inks). Read access for all authenticated users, write for admin/master data managers/inventory managers.

params.name: rawMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier for a raw material definition.

definition.description: Physical inventory lots of raw materials (jumbo rolls, slitted rolls, sub-slitted rolls). The hierarchy (Jumbo -> Slitted -> Sub-Slitted) is managed internally via the 'parentInventoryLotId' field. Access is role-based (e.g., InventoryManager, ProductionOperator).

params.name: inventoryLotId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific inventory lot (e.g., 'TLC-1001', 'TLC-1001-A').

definition.description: Master data for finished product definitions. Read access for all authenticated users, write for admin/master data managers/sales managers.

params.name: finishedGoodDefinitionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a finished good definition.

definition.description: Physical inventory batches of finished goods. Access is role-based (e.g., InventoryManager, DispatchManager).

params.name: finishedGoodInventoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific finished good inventory batch.

definition.description: Artwork files and metadata. The `uploadedByUserId` field acts as the ownerId for authorization, enabling secure listing and management by the creator, as well as by administrators.

params.name: artworkId
params.description: The unique identifier for an artwork.

definition.description: Cost estimates for label printing jobs. Includes `customerId` and `createdByUserId` for authorization independence, allowing owners and sales managers to manage. Requires adding `createdByUserId` to the schema.

params.name: estimateId
params.description: The unique identifier for an estimate.

definition.description: Bills of Material for finished goods. Includes `finishedGoodDefinitionId` and requires adding `createdByUserId` to the schema for authorization independence (e.g., allowing creator or production managers to manage).

params.name: billOfMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier for a Bill of Material.

definition.description: Raw material details within a Bill of Material. Includes denormalized `billOfMaterialId` and `billOfMaterialCreatedByUserId` for authorization independence.

params.name: billOfMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Bill of Material.

params.name: bomRawMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier for a raw material item within the BOM.

definition.description: Machine usage details within a Bill of Material. Includes denormalized `billOfMaterialId` and `billOfMaterialCreatedByUserId` for authorization independence.

params.name: billOfMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Bill of Material.

params.name: bomMachineId
params.description: The unique identifier for a machine item within the BOM.

definition.description: Die requirements within a Bill of Material. Includes denormalized `billOfMaterialId` and `billOfMaterialCreatedByUserId` for authorization independence.

params.name: billOfMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Bill of Material.

params.name: bomDieId
params.description: The unique identifier for a die item within the BOM.

definition.description: Plate requirements within a Bill of Material. Includes denormalized `billOfMaterialId` and `billOfMaterialCreatedByUserId` for authorization independence.

params.name: billOfMaterialId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Bill of Material.

params.name: bomPlateId
params.description: The unique identifier for a plate item within the BOM.

definition.description: Confirmed sales orders from customers. Includes `customerId` and `createdByUserId` for authorization independence, allowing owners, sales managers, and administrators to manage. The `createdByUserId` is crucial for QAPs.

params.name: salesOrderId
params.description: The unique identifier for a sales order.

definition.description: Line items for a specific SalesOrder. Includes denormalized `salesOrderId`, `salesOrderCustomerId`, and `salesOrderCreatedByUserId` from the parent SalesOrder for authorization independence.

params.name: salesOrderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent SalesOrder.

params.name: salesOrderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a sales order item.

definition.description: Detailed production job cards. Includes `salesOrderId`, `finishedGoodDefinitionId`, `assignedOperatorId`, `billOfMaterialId`. Requires adding `jobCardCreatedByUserId` (or equivalent `salesOrderCreatedByUserId`) and `salesOrderCustomerId` to the schema for authorization independence, allowing assigned operators, production managers, and sales-related users to access.

params.name: jobCardId
params.description: The unique identifier for a job card.

definition.description: Logs of specific production activities for a JobCard. Includes denormalized `jobCardId`, `jobCardAssignedOperatorId`, `jobCardCreatedByUserId`, and `jobCardSalesOrderCustomerId` for authorization independence.

params.name: jobCardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent JobCard.

params.name: productionLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for a production log entry.

definition.description: Records raw material consumption during a production activity. Includes denormalized `productionLogId`, `productionLogOperatorId`, `jobCardAssignedOperatorId`, `jobCardCreatedByUserId`, and `jobCardSalesOrderCustomerId` for full authorization independence.

params.name: jobCardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent JobCard.

params.name: productionLogId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent ProductionLog.

params.name: consumptionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a raw material consumption record.

definition.description: Quality control inspection records for a JobCard. Includes denormalized `jobCardId`, `jobCardAssignedOperatorId`, `jobCardCreatedByUserId`, and `jobCardSalesOrderCustomerId` for authorization independence.

params.name: jobCardId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent JobCard.

params.name: qualityCheckId
params.description: The unique identifier for a quality check record.

definition.description: Master data for production defect types. Read access for all authenticated users, write for admin/master data managers/QC managers.

params.name: defectId
params.description: The unique identifier for a defect type.

definition.description: Customer invoices. Includes `salesOrderId`, `customerId`, `generatedByUserId`. Requires adding `salesOrderCreatedByUserId` to the schema for authorization independence, allowing the invoice generator, billing managers, and sales order creator to manage.

params.name: invoiceId
params.description: The unique identifier for an invoice.

definition.description: Outbound shipments of finished goods. Includes `salesOrderId`, `customerId`, `generatedByUserId`. Requires adding `salesOrderCreatedByUserId` to the schema for authorization independence, allowing the dispatch generator, dispatch managers, and sales order creator to manage.

params.name: dispatchId
params.description: The unique identifier for a dispatch record.

definition.description: Packing lists for a specific dispatch. Includes denormalized `dispatchId`, `dispatchGeneratedByUserId`, `dispatchSalesOrderCreatedByUserId`, and `dispatchSalesOrderCustomerId` for authorization independence.

params.name: dispatchId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Dispatch.

params.name: packingListId
params.description: The unique identifier for a packing list.

definition.description: Line items for a specific packing list. Includes denormalized `packingListId`, `packingListPackedByUserId`, `dispatchGeneratedByUserId`, `dispatchSalesOrderCreatedByUserId`, and `dispatchSalesOrderCustomerId` for full authorization independence.

params.name: dispatchId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Dispatch.

params.name: packingListId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent PackingList.

params.name: packingListItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a packing list item.

definition.description: Purchase orders placed with suppliers. Includes `supplierId` and `createdByUserId` for authorization independence, allowing owners, purchasing managers, and administrators to manage.

params.name: purchaseOrderId
params.description: The unique identifier for a purchase order.

definition.description: Line items for a specific PurchaseOrder. Includes denormalized `purchaseOrderId`, `purchaseOrderSupplierId`, and `purchaseOrderCreatedByUserId` from the parent PurchaseOrder for authorization independence.

params.name: purchaseOrderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent PurchaseOrder.

params.name: purchaseOrderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a purchase order item.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and consistent Access Modeling to ensure robust, debuggable, and scalable security rules. Each collection's purpose and its authorization implications are clearly defined.

**Authorization Independence via Denormalization:**
This is achieved by strategically denormalizing authorization-critical fields from parent documents into their subcollection documents, or from related top-level collections into the current document, to eliminate the need for `get()` calls in security rules. For example:

*   `SalesOrderItem` documents will include `salesOrderCreatedByUserId` and `salesOrderCustomerId` from their parent `SalesOrder` to allow direct authorization checks without fetching the parent `SalesOrder` document.
*   `ProductionLog` and `QualityCheck` documents, which are nested under `JobCard`, will denormalize `jobCardAssignedOperatorId`, `jobCardCreatedByUserId`, and `jobCardSalesOrderCustomerId` from their parent `JobCard` (and indirectly from `SalesOrder`). This ensures that an operator or QC inspector's access to a specific log or check can be validated solely from the document itself and the user's `uid`.
*   Deeply nested items like `ProductionRawMaterialConsumption` and `PackingListItem` carry a chain of denormalized IDs (e.g., `productionLogOperatorId`, `jobCardAssignedOperatorId`, `salesOrderCreatedByUserId`, `dispatchGeneratedByUserId`) to maintain complete authorization independence at every level.

This approach ensures that operations like creating, updating, or deleting a `PackingListItem` can be authorized by rules that only examine the `request.auth.uid` and the `resource.data` of the `PackingListItem` itself, preventing complex, error-prone, and performance-impacting `get()` calls.

**Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):**
Each collection is designed to hold documents with a homogeneous security posture. For instance, all `Customer` documents are accessible to roles like 'Sales' or 'Admin'. Global, static data like `UnitOfMeasure` or `Defect` is in its own collection, usually allowing read access to all authenticated users and write access to 'Admin' or 'MasterDataAdmin' roles. User-specific data like `Artwork` is owned by `uploadedByUserId`, making `list` operations secure by filtering on `ownerId == request.auth.uid` (QAP). This separation avoids mixing public and private data in the same collection, simplifying rule logic.

**QAPs (Queries as Authorization Predicates):**
The data structure facilitates secure `list` operations without relying on security rules acting as filters. For user-specific lists, like a user's `Artwork` or `Estimate` documents, the `createdByUserId` or `uploadedByUserId` field is present in each document. This allows clients to query `artworks.where('uploadedByUserId', '==', request.auth.uid)` and have the security rules validate that `request.auth.uid == resource.data.uploadedByUserId` for any document returned, making the query both efficient and secure. For system-wide data, roles defined in `/_system_roles/admins/{userId}` enable secure listing for authorized personnel (e.g., `allow list: if exists(/_system_roles/admins/$(request.auth.uid));`).

**InventoryLot Hierarchy:**
The user's specific query about `TLC-1001-A` and `TLC-1001-A-1` refers to the `id` naming convention within the `InventoryLot` entity. The `InventoryLot` collection (`/inventoryLots/{inventoryLotId}`) effectively models this hierarchy using the `parentInventoryLotId` field within the document, rather than nested subcollections. This allows for a single, flat collection for all raw material lots (jumbo, slitted, sub-slitted) which simplifies querying across all inventory items (e.g., `inventoryLots.where('parentInventoryLotId', '==', 'TLC-1001')`). Authorization for this collection is typically role-based (e.g., 'InventoryManager', 'ProductionOperator'), making a `get()` on parent unnecessary for security rules related to lot relationships.
